content.claim: Teacher and professional representative bodies are divided: PDSZ union urges admissions reform and segregation mitigation rather than abolition; PSZ president potentially supports phase-out; National Pedagogue Chamber president advocates institution-by-institution accountability review based on competence-test results rather than structural abolition.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Legal and governance lens
limitations: These are organizational positions stated in a governance debate, not empirical findings on track effectiveness
No quantified data on internal union member opinion or whether leadership positions reflect rank-and-file consensus
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
